topics.title: Dynamic Brain Networks Across the Lifespan
topics.description: This cluster centers on how human brain network organization changes over the lifespan, with emphasis on dynamic functional connectivity, brain states, and structure-function coupling. It also includes work on brain network models and foundation models for understanding cognition and individual differences.

topics.title: Neural Basis of Language and Cognition
topics.description: This cluster centers on how brain activity and neural representations support language, speech, attention, and higher-order cognition. It also includes work on visual and action-related processing, with some studies using fMRI and decoding approaches.

topics.title: Transdiagnostic Psychiatric Disorders and Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on major psychiatric disorders, especially schizophrenia, depression, bipolar disorder, anxiety, and related transdiagnostic psychopathology. It also includes studies linking these conditions to functional connectivity and broader brain network alterations.

topics.title: Neuroimaging Markers of Alzheimer Decline
topics.description: This cluster centers on neurodegenerative and Alzheimer-related brain changes linked to cognitive decline, dementia, and aging. The abstracts emphasize imaging and biomarker measures such as MRI, amyloid, tau, atrophy, and cortical thickness.

topics.title: Neurodevelopmental Trajectories in Autism and Childhood
topics.description: This cluster focuses on neurodevelopment across childhood and adolescence, especially autism spectrum disorder and related symptoms. It also highlights developmental trajectories, including associations with white matter and functional connectivity.

topics.title: Epilepsy Localization and Network Modulation
topics.description: This cluster centers on epilepsy, especially temporal lobe and focal forms, with emphasis on identifying epileptogenic and seizure onset zones using EEG and intracranial recordings. It also highlights network-level changes, causal mapping, and neuromodulation approaches.

topics.title: Deep Learning MRI Segmentation and Resolution
topics.description: This cluster centers on deep learning approaches for MRI segmentation and reconstruction, often using high-field and ultra-high-resolution imaging. It also includes work on quantitative MRI, cortical folding, and validation of automated methods across brain imaging datasets.

topics.title: Stroke-Related White Matter and Recovery
topics.description: This cluster centers on stroke and related brain injury, with emphasis on white matter disruption, structural connectivity, and lesion-based analyses. The abstracts focus on predicting functional recovery and motor outcomes from microstructural and disconnection measures.

topics.title: Neural Bases of Emotion Regulation
topics.description: This cluster centers on how emotion regulation and emotion processing relate to neural correlates in affective and social behavior, especially across anxiety, depression, fear, and resilience. It emphasizes brain regions such as the amygdala and pfc, with a particular interest in adolescent functioning.

topics.title: Sleep, Fatigue, and Brain Metabolism
topics.description: This cluster centers on sleep-related symptoms and fatigue across neurological and systemic conditions, especially multiple sclerosis and long covid. It also includes links to brain metabolism, cerebrovascular function, and network-level changes in healthy aging.

topics.title: EEG Aperiodic Dynamics in Brain States
topics.description: This cluster centers on EEG and electrophysiology studies of brain state dynamics, including consciousness, sleep, anesthesia depth, and developmental or age-related changes. It also includes disorder-related applications such as Alzheimer and ALS, with emphasis on alpha activity and aperiodic EEG features.

topics.title: Neural Mechanisms of Addiction and Craving
topics.description: This cluster centers on addiction-related disorders, especially craving, reward, inhibitory control, and cue-driven behavior across substances such as alcohol, cannabis, opioids, and methamphetamine. It also includes adolescent substance exposure and abstinence-related phenomena linked to neurocircuitry and behavior.

topics.title: Open Neuroimaging Infrastructure and Workflows
topics.description: This cluster centers on open science neuroimaging infrastructure, with emphasis on shared tools, standardized data handling, and cloud-enabled processing workflows. It highlights efforts to improve interoperability, collaborative execution, and clinically actionable neuroimaging pipelines.

topics.title: Neural Mechanisms of Chronic Pain
topics.description: This cluster centers on chronic pain conditions and how pain is represented and modulated in the brain, including human pain networks, insula responses, and cortical pain phenotypes. It also links pain outcomes to central sensitization, fear avoidance processes, and related clinical syndromes such as chronic migraine and widespread pain.

topics.title: Hormonal Modulation of Brain Structure and Connectivity
topics.description: This cluster centers on how hormones and reproductive transitions shape brain structure, connectivity, and function across development and aging. It includes studies of menstrual cycle effects, perimenopause and menopause transition, and related multimodal neuroimaging and animal work.
